global.description: The ad features a bright yellow background with food containers and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a special offer.

elements.label: Yellow background
elements.description: A solid yellow background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'SnapMeal' in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Empty containers
elements.description: Two empty food containers with lids, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Empty containers
elements.description: A larger empty food container with a lid, placed slightly behind the smaller containers.

elements.label: Empty container
elements.description: A small empty food container with a lid, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Empty container
elements.description: A small circular empty food container, located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: Bold text reading 'Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text '€29.99 Order now' in a contrasting color at the bottom.

elements.label: SnapMeal logo
elements.description: The logo 'SnapMeal' displayed at the top left corner in a bold font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the text 'SALE' in a bright color at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content
elements.description: The text 'UGC' in a small font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.
